falsification_conditions.condition: SPX closes above 5,600 on any day in the next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The bottom_2024_aug pattern typically features lower highs and failed recoveries; a clean breakout above the prior resistance invalidates the structural breakdown thesis and suggests accumulation rather than distribution

falsification_conditions.condition: VIX closes below 14.00 for 3 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The blowoff score of 41 implies residual fear/uncertainty; sustained VIX compression into pre-crisis levels would disprove the stress-continuation hypothesis and indicate the 'bottom' was already formed

falsification_conditions.condition: 10Y Treasury yield drops below 3.80% while SPX simultaneously trades above 5,400
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This combination signals a goldilocks/rate-cut-anticipation regime, which is structurally incompatible with the bottom_2024_aug analog that featured stagflationary or credit-stress dynamics with falling stocks and sticky/rising yields

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
